description: Use this API to calculate positive sequence equivalents of branch unbalances. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = spcb(ibus, jbus, ckt, options, values)
python_syntax: ierr = spcb(ibus, jbus, ckt, options, values)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus of branch subjected to unbalance. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus of branch subjected to unbalance. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of branch subjected to unbalance. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying unbalance OPTIONS. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying unbalance parameters. (input).

options.description: path to ground code (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4) (0 by default).
type of in-line fault code (used when OPTIONS(1) is 3) (1 by default).
open end code (used when OPTIONS(1) is 4) (1 by default).
breaker at to bus is open.
breaker at from bus is open.

values.description: fault location as fraction of line from from bus; 0.0 < VALUES(1) < 1.0 (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4 and OPTIONS(2) is 1; or when OPTIONS(1) is 3) (0.5 by default).
& (3) Rl-g and Xl-g (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4 and OPTIONS(2) is 1; or when OPTIONS(1) is 3 and OPTIONS(3) is 1 or 2) (0.0 by default).
& (5) Rl-l and Xl-l (used when OPTIONS(1) is 3 and OPTIONS(3) is 2) (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid with two phase modeling option enabled.
SEQD temporary file is not open.
SEQD results are not compatible with the working case.
terminated due to invalid fault specification or application.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
